DISCOVERY 302, AUG-16-2023. HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS JUDAH TERRACES OWNERS ASSOCIATION, AGH REALTY GROUP CORP.'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS. RULING IS DISCUSSED. AT CONCLUSION OF DISCUSSION, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. EXCEPT FOR THE ISSUE OF SANCTIONS, THE MOTION IS MOOT BECAUSE DISCOVERY RESPONSES HAVE BEEN SERVED. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $380. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PROVIDE A FORM OF ORDER THAT TRACKS THE TENTATIVE RULING VERBATIM TO THE PRO TEM JUDGE VIA EMAIL TO TOM@THOMASCOHEN.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: THOMAS COHEN. CLERK: R. WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-16-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):

Michelle Weiss, Esq., INFINITY LAW GROUP, LLP, (925) 732-1188, for Plaintiff.

Timothy R. Smyth, Esq., LAW OFFICES OF JOHN A. BIARD, (925) 746-3973, for Defendants.

RE: DEFENDANTS JUDAH TERRACES OWNERS ASSOCIATION, AGH REALTY GROUP CORP.'s Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions.

Defendant and Plaintiff stipulate to the matter being decided by the Pro Tem Judge. The Pro Tem Judge and Counsel for Defendant and Plaintiff (all appearing remotely) authorize the Clerk to sign the Formal Stipulation on their behalf.

Ruling is discussed. At conclusion of discussion, the court adopts its tentative ruling. Except for the issue of sanctions, the Motion is moot because discovery responses have been served. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $380.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to provide a form of order that tracks the tentative ruling verbatim to the pro tem Judge via email to tom@thomascohen.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Thomas Cohen. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JPT)
